name: Cinnamon Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 (8-ounce) large apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flours, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. Stir until well combined.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat the sugar and oil until blended.
4. Add the egg, egg whites, and vanilla; beat for 1 minute.
5. Reserve any remaining yolks for another use.
6. Beat in the apple juice.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture using low speed, just until combined.
8. Stir in the apple slices and walnuts.
9. Pour the batter into a generously greased and floured 10-inch tube pan or 12-cup bundt pan.
10. Smooth the top with a spatula.
11. Place in the center rack of the oven.
12. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
13. Cool for 10 minutes on a wire rack before gently removing from the pan.
14. Dust with powdered sugar using a fine sieve.
15. Serve warm and accompany with small scoops of frozen vanilla yogurt.
